Explore Programs

Courses & Programs

From gentle introductions to sustained practice — find the course that is right for where you are.

8-week course

Introduction to Meditation

An 8-week foundation course

Learn to settle your mind and find genuine peace. This friendly, step-by-step course introduces the core techniques of Buddhist meditation in a completely accessible way — no experience, no belief required.

🕐 Tuesdays 7:00–9:00pm $195 · sliding scale available Beginner-friendly
8-week course

The Compassionate Heart

Lojong — training the mind in compassion

A transformative eight-week programme in the Tibetan Buddhist art of mind training. Learn to work with difficult emotions, cultivate genuine kindness, and develop the courage to open your heart to yourself and others.

🕐 Thursdays 7:00–9:00pm $195 · sliding scale available All levels
6-week course

Mindful Living

Meditation for everyday life

A six-week exploration of how meditation practice can transform the way we live, work, and relate. Practical, grounded, and immediately applicable to the challenges of modern life.

🕐 Wednesdays 6:30–8:30pm $145 · sliding scale available Beginner-friendly
Weekly drop-in

Thursday Evening Sitting

Drop-in community meditation

A free weekly drop-in meditation session open to everyone. Thirty minutes of guided meditation followed by a short teaching and informal tea. No booking required — just come.

🕐 Every Thursday 6:00–7:30pm Free · dana welcome All levels
Sliding scale & scholarships. We never want cost to be a barrier. Every course offers sliding scale pricing, and full scholarships are available for those in genuine financial need — contact us before registering.
Stillwater Dharma Center

A non-sectarian centre for meditation and contemplative practice,
open to all, rooted in kindness.

28 River Bend Lane, Woodstock, NY 12498
 (845) 555-0174
 info@stillwaterdharma.org
